page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. The system features 372.0 GB of system memory, providing 3.88 GB per core. It integrates four NVIDIA T4 GPUs based on the Turing architecture, delivering a total of 64 GB of VRAM. There is no local storage bundled with this instance, and it relies on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 30 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks highlight a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. While single-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by stress-ng and single-threaded compression tests, multi-core performance is strong, scoring 70,574.45 in stress-ng multi-core tests. Memory bandwidth for cached small blocks is highly efficient at 3,924.63 GB/sec, though large-block uncached read and write speeds align with average tier performance. Multi-threaded decompression is highly capable, reaching 287.37 GB/sec.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, this instance offers a dense consolidation of compute, memory, and GPU resources, though the lack of local storage requires external storage solutions. It is highly suited for GPU-accelerated workloads such as machine learning inference, multi-threaded data processing, high-throughput Redis caching databases, and parallelized compute tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores on an x86_64 architecture running at 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 372.0 GB of RAM and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs providing a total of 64 GB of VRAM, with no local storage. Running on a KVM hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 30 Gbps. Benchmark data indicates weak single-core performance but strong multi-core capabilities, with high cached memory bandwidth and excellent multi-threaded decompression speeds. The instance also demonstrates strong performance in Redis SET operations, handling 64.27 million operations per second. This hardware profile is optimized for parallel processing, machine learning inference, and multi-threaded database workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 372 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs with 64 GB total VRAM, optimized for parallel computing and machine learning.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 96 Intel Xeon cores, 372 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs.
tagline: A high-density GPU instance featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and four accelerators for parallelized workloads and machine learning inference.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz
Four NVIDIA T4 Turing GPUs with 64 GB of combined VRAM
372 GB of system memory and 30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Strong multi-core processing and cached memory bandwidth performance
No local storage, requiring external storage attachments
Best suited for machine learning inference and parallel database operations
